## Quality Checklist

- [ ] Tests written and passing (`pytest`)
- [ ] Linting clean (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] Formatting clean (`ruff format --check .`)
- [ ] Type checking clean (`mypy app/`)
- [ ] Coverage meets threshold (`pytest --cov=app --cov-fail-under=80`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)

## TDD Checklist

- [ ] Tests written before implementation (RED)
- [ ] Implementation passes tests (GREEN)
- [ ] Code refactored (REFACTOR)
- [ ] Full test suite passes (VERIFY)
